title: fraxinus oxycarpa f. taurica
intro: Fraxinus oxycarpa f. taurica, also known as the Tatarian ash, is a deciduous tree species belonging to the Oleaceae family. The medicinal properties of Fraxinus oxycarpa f. taurica include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Fraxinus oxycarpa f. taurica is often used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
